auth.loginDescription: Choose a sign-in method to unlock all features.
auth.emailCodeLogin: Sign in with email verification code
auth.configurationMissing: Sign-in configuration is unavailable. Try again later.

accountSwitch.syncingDescription: Your account changed in another app. Switching securely now.
accountSwitch.blockedDescription: Requests from the previous account are paused. Retry or sign in again.

emailCode.title: Sign in with email
emailCode.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a verification code. If this is your first time, we'll create your account automatically.
emailCode.codeDescription: We sent a verification code to {{email}}
emailCode.codeResent: A new verification code has been sent

errors.invalid_code: The code is incorrect. Try again.
errors.code_expired: The code has expired. Send a new one.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
errors.interaction_expired: This sign-in attempt has expired. Request a new code.
errors.interaction_consumed: This code has already been used. Request a new code.
errors.delivery_unavailable: We couldn't send a code right now. Try again later.
errors.network_error: Network connection failed. Check your connection and try again.
errors.server_error: The sign-in service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

contextStatus.title: Context status
contextStatus.unknownWindow: Context window information is not available for this model
contextStatus.awaitingEstimate: Calculating context usage for this round
contextStatus.finalUnavailable: Actual context usage is unavailable for this round
contextStatus.latestActualUnavailable: This round did not return actual usage. Showing the latest available result.
contextStatus.historyIntact: To control context length, the system may read less early content for this round. Conversation history remains intact.
contextStatus.requiredOverBudget: Required context exceeds the model window. This request was not sent.
contextStatus.estimatorUnavailable: Context could not be calculated. This request was not sent.
